title: Zone comfort dashboard widgets (UI)
prompt: After building-hvac is installed, add or open a zone comfort dashboard with widgets bound to HVAC zone temperatures and open it in Operator mode.
uiJourney: Explorer / Dashboard builder → bind zone temps → Operator
humanSteps: Open building-hvac dashboards in admin Dashboard builder.
Add comfort widgets bound to zone temperature variables; save.
Open Operator building-hvac and confirm comfort values.
